hcf40c763gbc83g4a49ga50bg02ae7282d416: And thus the vampire spawn is relinquished. You were selfish. Insensitive.
h92f92aedgfaeag43a4g86edg22cb33b3288b: Selfish? He was a threat - I only did what was right.
hbd7e48d2g6ff6g444egbe15ge7063e31dafd: Has this place so softened your nerve that you must claim a moral victory?
h6a4fad0cge026g4ffbg9970g0e026681f94a: Astarion was no threat to you, not with me at your side. You simply wished him to suffer.
he42c5a1dg311eg48ccg9001gf155f53223ec: I find few things delightful. Your surrender of Astarion is among them.
h136f2ed9g9d43g4f6agaaffgb0d1f4a4f7fc: As I expected - your feeble conscience demands that you claim a moral victory. But I know the truth.
h266d45a8g98dbg4104gb3d4gcfea7e053198: You approve? I expected you to object.
h4a86d65cgbec3g4069g9476ged7dbbd90595: 'The more allies we gain, the more assured our survival.' Is this more to your liking?
hf5a1c830g858dg4ddag90f0g70d6dd4507bc: Astarion's gifts were useful, it is true. Truer still is my joy in your cruelty.
h600ad038g3f42g4132gb57agfd371d9b6a14: Did you see the look on his face? Priceless.
h07adf8f2gf689g4f13ga953g4eb3176a7ec6: I'm no more likely to forget it than I am the parasite in my head.
hbf4a7b6bgc9efg4721gb388gb36217db496c: My only regret is that I won't be there for the execution.
hc232e73dga107g4ceeg98edgc042d90881a4: A welcome surprise. Your heart grows so cold, it might very well stop beating.
hbb351a91gca3dg4452g9173g0d2d9d4ac117: I won't deny another hero his quarry.
h11208decg23b2g4108gae87g3db1bf472705: Yes, how very altruistic of you to cede your ally to a complete stranger.
h759f5f0cg2848g4974g9ec5g0ba11e6e1668: Astarion was no threat to you, nor the frontier you profess to protect. You simply wished him to suffer.
h3351ad10g3619g4d95gb6beg85b67049895e: The frontier is safer without Astarion to terrorise it.
h58f0e343gd7e1g4845g9c41g7eb69499eb4b: As I expected - the Blade's conscience demands that he claim a moral victory. But I know the truth.
